name: Mexican Style Lasagne
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 375°F.
In a bowl, combine enchilada sauce, tomatoes with their juice, and tomato paste. Mix well to blend the ingredients.
Stir in black beans.
Spoon one-third of the tomato sauce mixture over the bottom of a 12 x 8-inch baking dish.
Top with three uncooked lasagne noodles. Spread evenly with one cup cottage cheese and sprinkle with one cup cheddar cheese.
Spoon half of the remaining tomato sauce mixture on top.
Add another layer of three noodles, one cup cottage cheese, then sprinkle with one cup cheddar cheese.
Add the last three noodles, the remaining tomato sauce, and the remaining cheddar cheese.
Cover tightly with foil and bake for 50-60 minutes.
Before serving, sprinkle sliced scallions on top.
